title: Oil prices fall more than 5% after Rubio says US will give Iran talks 'every chance to succeed' — WTI $88.68, Brent $94.29, lowest since April
snippet: WTI crude tumbled 5%+ to $88.68, Brent lost 5% to $94.29 — both at lowest since April 2026. Drop triggered by Iranian state TV publishing MoU draft details showing Hormuz restoration within 30 days and US blockade lift. Rubio: 'we prefer the negotiated diplomatic route and we're going to give it every chance to succeed.'
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 유가 $88.68/$94.29 급락 보도 없음. 5/27 MoU 초안 공개 후 5%+ 급락은 신규.
